articles.title: The SpaceX IPO filing is filled with AI bets, Starship dreams, and Elon Musk at the center
articles.description: SpaceX has finally made the contents of its IPO filing public, weeks ahead of what is expected to be the largest IPO ever and one that will make Musk the CEO, CTO, and Chairman of the board.

articles.title: Clouted wants to take the guesswork out of making short videos go viral
articles.description: The video clipping startup raised a $7 million seed round led by Slow Ventures.

articles.title: xAI burned $6.4B last year. SpaceX’s IPO filing shows why the spending is far from over
articles.description: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals xAI lost $6.4 billion in 2025 while planning a massive Grok expansion — offering the first public look at Elon Musk's AI financials and more details about his ambitions.

articles.title: Nvidia posts another record quarter, reveals $43B of holdings in startups
articles.description: Nvidia announced another record revenue figure after market close on Wednesday, but forecasted that revenue growth would slow in the following quarter.

articles.title: Musk’s xAI is being sued over its data center generators — now it’s buying $2.8B more
articles.description: Elon Musk's xAI said it will buy $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over the next three years, according to SpaceX's IPO filing.

articles.title: Anthropic will pay xAI $1.25B per month for compute
articles.description: Elon Musk's xAI surprised the AI world when it made a deal to sell compute to Anthropic. Now we know how much it's worth.

articles.title: Sam Altman makes ‘mic drop’ offer to every Y Combinator startup
articles.description: Altman offered to have OpenAI invest in every single startup in this Y Combinator class: tokens for equity.

articles.title: You don’t need to be an AI startup to raise. Lucra has $20M to prove it.
articles.description: Slapping “AI” on your startup’s pitch deck is basically table stakes right now. When a founder raised $20 million from Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest for an eSports gamification loyalty startup without those two letters in the spotlight, it got us wondering how the conversation even started — especially when ARK had already been burned by a company operating in the same space.  On this episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, Julie […]

articles.title: Microsoft’s carbon-removal plans aren’t dead after all
articles.description: Microsoft is responsible for over 90% of the carbon-removal market, and reports suggested the company was pausing purchases entirely. This new deal should help assuage the fears of CDR startups.

articles.title: OpenAI claims it solved an 80-year-old math problem — for real this time
articles.description: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946 — and this time, the mathematicians who exposed its last embarrassing claim are backing it up.

articles.title: IrisGo, a startup backed by Andrew Ng, looks to become the AI desktop buddy you never knew you needed
articles.description: Initially billed as an "AI butler," Iris watches what happens on a user's desktop and automatically learns how to do tasks for them, its co-founder says.

articles.title: Tesla’s Full Self-Driving software is creeping into Europe
articles.description: First came the Netherlands, now it's Lithuania. And more European countries appear to be in the queue for Tesla's driver-assistance system.

articles.title: Airbnb gets into hotels, expands AI for host onboarding and customer support
articles.description: Airbnb will soon let you book luggage storage and car rental services on its app.

articles.title: Global EV market goes K-shaped as the US gets left behind
articles.description: EV sales have surged worldwide in every region but the U.S., posing risks for legacy and startup automakers.

articles.title: OpenAI barrels toward IPO that may happen in September
articles.description: A day after Elon Musk lost his lawsuit that threatened OpenAI's structure, leadership, and finances, OpenAI is reportedly back to prepping for its IPO.

articles.title: Jeff Bezos, you were so close to making a good point
articles.description: "Why is a nurse in Queens who makes $75,000 a year paying more than $1,000 a month in taxes?" Bezos said Wednesday morning on CNBC. "That's $1,000 that could help with rent, or groceries, or anything."

articles.title: Customers say Trump Mobile is leaking their personal information
articles.description: Trump Mobile is leaking customers’ email and home addresses but has not responded to people alerting the company of the data exposure, according to two YouTubers who said they verified that their leaked data is authentic.

articles.title: Intuit to lay off over 3,000 employees to refocus on AI
articles.description: In a memo to employees, CEO Sasan Goodarzi said the layoffs are meant to reduce complexity, simplify the company's corporate structure, and deliver better AI products.

articles.title: AI search startups are blowing up
articles.description: AI search has quietly become one of the most attractive targets in consumer AI.

articles.title: Stability AI releases a new audio model that can create 6-minute songs
articles.description: Stability Audio 3.0 small model can run on-device and generate two-minute long tracks.

articles.title: Trump admin didn't want Ebola-exposed Americans, sent them to Berlin, Prague
articles.description: Officials denied refusing entry, but dodged questions on why Americans didn't return.

articles.title: NASA's Psyche spacecraft returns unfamiliar views of a familiar world
articles.description: "As a bonus, it captured Mars images from a rare perspective."

articles.title: Masters of the Universe final trailer brings the '80s nostalgia
articles.description: "You are he who will restore peace to Eternia."

articles.title: Leaving the V8 in the past: The all-electric Mercedes-AMG GT 4-Door
articles.description: The 0–60 time is impressive, the miles/kWh number even more so.

articles.title: "Ryzen 5800X3D 10th Anniversary Edition" may help you avoid paying for a new PC
articles.description: It could be one way to make your old PC play nicely with a high-end GPU.

articles.title: Google publishes exploit code threatening millions of Chromium users
articles.description: Google publishes exploit code before patch, reported 29 months earlier, is fixed.

articles.title: Trump wants $1B to protect White House ballroom from drones and other threats
articles.description: President asks $1B from taxpayers to secure his $400M privately funded ballroom.

articles.title: Hulu set to keep existing as standalone streaming service and app (for now)
articles.description: Disney still has a lot of tech to unite and bundles to push.

articles.title: Chickens without eggs? De-extinction company creates artificial egg.
articles.description: In the process, Colossal may have handed a useful tool to developmental biology.

articles.title: Minnesota prohibits prediction markets, promptly gets sued by Trump admin
articles.description: State law makes it a felony to create, operate, or advertise prediction markets.

articles.title: Buckle up: Google is set to remake search with agentic AI in 2026
articles.description: Google's AI search evolution is accelerating at I/O 2026.

articles.title: Man jailed for posting Trump meme wins $835,000 settlement
articles.description: Sheriff loses fight with man he jailed for 37 days for posting a Trump meme on Facebook.

articles.description: We now pause for a word from our sponsors.

articles.title: Yearslong fight over users' right to tweak smart TV software heads to trial
articles.description: Access to TV OS's source code could allow users to limit ads, tracking.

articles.description: The chip was added to a list of banned goods at China’s customs checkpoints last Friday.

articles.title: The Internet can't stop watching Figure AI's humanoid robots handling packages
articles.description: Figure AI's 24/7 livestream showcases human soft spot for humanoid robots.

articles.title: Moose-proof and megacasting: Ars drives the new Volvo EX60
articles.description: Volvo is coming for its competitors with more efficient production and newer tech.

articles.title: FBI seeks US-wide access to license plate cameras, wants "data in near real time"
articles.description: FBI will pay vendors to help it track and search for vehicles nationwide.

articles.title: Spider-Noir final trailer gives us a classic villain
articles.description: It's never too late to become a hero.

articles.title: "I'll buy 10 of those"—NASA science chief yearns for mass-produced satellites
articles.description: "How in the hell do I get more science into space? That is my goal."

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **SpaceX IPO文件揭示多重战略布局**：文件显示SpaceX正大力押注人工智能、推进星舰（Starship）计划，并以埃隆·马斯克为核心，同时其关联公司xAI去年亏损64亿美元，但支出仍将持续，包括购买28亿美元的数据中心发电机并面临诉讼。
2. **AI领域巨额资本流动与竞争加剧**：Anthropic每月向xAI支付12.5亿美元用于算力；Nvidia创下新季度纪录，并披露持有430亿美元初创公司股份；OpenAI声称解决了80年数学难题，并可能于9月进行IPO；Sam Altman向所有Y Combinator初创公司提供“重磅”优惠。
3. **AI应用与行业拓展持续深化**：Clouted推出助力短视频爆款的工具；IrisGo（吴恩达支持）开发AI桌面助手；特斯拉全自动驾驶软件逐步进入欧洲；Airbnb引入AI支持房东入驻和客户服务，并涉足酒店业务；全球电动车市场呈现K型分化，美国落后。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：SpaceX IPO文件不仅揭示了其AI和星际旅行的雄心，更暴露了xAI的巨额亏损与持续烧钱模式，凸显出AI领域资本密集竞争的白热化，同时OpenAI、Nvidia、Anthropic等巨头的动作预示着行业格局可能迎来重大洗牌。

articles.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
articles.description: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.

articles.title: A new experiment brings better group meetings to Google Beam
articles.description: See and hear your colleagues in true-to-life size and sound, making hybrid meetings feel more inclusive and connected.

articles.description: At Google I/O 2026, we shared how we’re making AI more helpful for everyone. See everything we announced.

articles.description: One year after launch, see how AI Mode’s users are shifting from keywords to natural language queries.

articles.description: Announcing new voice capabilities in Gmail, Docs and Keep, a new design tool called Google Pics and updates to AI Inbox.

articles.description: The latest from Google I/O: See how we’re helping you get more done with Gemini.

articles.description: At Google I/O we released Gemini 3.5, our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.

articles.description: We shared the next step in our journey to bring together the best of a search engine with the best of AI.

articles.title: Everything new in our Google AI subscriptions, fresh from I/O 2026
articles.description: Introducing a $100 AI Ultra plan — plus, new features and benefits for Google AI Plus, Pro and Ultra subscribers.

articles.title: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
articles.description: An OpenAI model solved the 80-year-old unit distance problem, disproving a major conjecture in discrete geometry and marking a milestone in AI-driven mathematics.

articles.title: How Ramp engineers accelerate code review with Codex
articles.description: How Ramp engineers use Codex with GPT-5.5 to review code and ship improvements, allowing them to get substantive feedback in minutes instead of hours.

articles.title: The next phase of OpenAI’s Education for Countries
articles.description: OpenAI advances Education for Countries, expanding AI adoption in schools with new partnerships, teacher training, and tools to improve global learning outcomes.

articles.title: Introducing OpenAI for Singapore
articles.description: OpenAI for Singapore launches a multi-year AI partnership to expand deployment, build local talent, and support businesses and public services with AI.

articles.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
articles.description: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.

articles.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
articles.description: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.

articles.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
articles.description: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.

articles.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
articles.description: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.

articles.description: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.

articles.description: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.

articles.title: How data science teams use Codex
articles.description: See how data science teams can use Codex to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.

articles.title: How sales teams use Codex
articles.description: See how sales teams can use Codex to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.

articles.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
articles.description: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **多模态与地球观测模型更新**：Hugging Face发布OlmoEarth v1.1高效地球观测模型系列、Ettin Reranker系列及PaddleOCR 3.5（集成Transformers后端），并推出开源多语言嵌入模型Granite Embedding Multilingual R2（32K上下文，最佳子亿级检索质量）。
2. **机器人视频生成与智能体排行榜**：NVIDIA Cosmos Predict 2.5支持LoRA/DoRA微调用于机器人视频生成；Hugging Face推出开放智能体排行榜，并公布连续批处理异步化技术进展。
3. **Google I/O 2026重大发布**：谷歌宣布Gemini 3.5（具备行动能力的边界智能）、AI搜索模式在美国改变用户行为、Workspace新增创作与效率工具，以及Google Beam群组会议新实验，同时公布密苏里州社区投资计划。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：Google I/O 2026正式开启“智能体Gemini时代”，Gemini 3.5的发布标志着AI从“理解”向“主动行动”的关键跨越，同时Hugging Face密集推出多项开源模型与工具，持续推动多模态、检索与智能体领域的开放生态竞争。

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. **历史与主权议题**：东京审判揭露靖国神社扭曲历史叙事，重申二战正义审判的合法性。
2. **科技与就业平衡**：中国推动人工智能发展，同时强调以不牺牲就业岗位为前提，确保技术红利惠及民生。
3. **稀土战略与能源创新**：中国稀土杠杆作用持续增强，同时部署全球首个风电冷却海底数据中心，新增电网规模相当于德国全年发电量。
4. **国际竞争与太空博弈**：中美俄三国在地球静止轨道展开战略博弈；美国前总统特朗普启动对华“脱钩”政策，但中国在AI、效率等领域持续领先。
5. **人才与历史反思**：纪念钱学森——美国失去、中国获得的导弹天才；中国“最后班车”等民生议题引发对老龄化与社会变迁的关注。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：中国在人工智能与新能源领域同步发力，既以“效率护城河”超越美国，又通过海底数据中心、稀土杠杆等举措强化全球技术自主权，凸显“发展不牺牲就业”的平衡智慧。
